title: LMIABridge Demo - CORRECTED Spec (Transcript-to-Screen Mapping)
note: EVERY screen is matched to actual keyword from transcript. Cross-verified against available PNG files.

timeline.keywords: Canada needs half a million immigrants... sustain its economy... broken... six thousand dollars... fraudsters... thirty thousand... LMIABridge fixes
timeline.requirements: STATIC HOMEPAGE - No transitions. Let narration dominate. Problem statement clear.

timeline.keywords: Let me show you... real scenario... Clio... legal tech... needs software developer
timeline.narration: Setting up scenario with empty form
timeline.requirements: Empty form ready to fill. Transition moment.

timeline.keywords: Themis Solutions Inc, NOC-21232, Ontario... Watch what happens when we enter the wage
timeline.narration: All form fields populated with demo data
timeline.requirements: Company name, NOC, location, all fields VISIBLE and READABLE

timeline.keywords: A Tinyfish web agent just navigated
timeline.requirements: Loading spinner or agent initialization visible. Transition to animation.

timeline.keywords: and pulled the ESDC median wage
timeline.requirements: ANIMATION - Show agent actively working. Real-time data extraction visual.
timeline.note: Let animation play. Agent should appear to be querying live data.

timeline.keywords: forty-eight dollars and eight cents per hour... Clio is offering fifty-two dollars... above median, wage compliant... LMIA wage requirements satisfied
timeline.narration: CRITICAL: Wage compliance result - MOST IMPORTANT SCREEN
timeline.requirements: ⭐ MUST HOLD FOR 9 SECONDS. GREEN CHECKMARK. $48.08 MEDIAN. $52.88 OFFERED. Both numbers fully readable and visible. User reads numbers while hearing them spoken.
timeline.note: LONGEST HOLD TIME. Most important data point. If this screen isn't readable, VC pitch fails. Verify in actual PNG that both dollar amounts are displayed.

timeline.keywords: Now we verify Cleo as a legitimate Canadian... not a database lookup
timeline.requirements: Verification screen or agent starting. Transition to verification animation.
timeline.note: Show agent initializing for corporate verification

timeline.keywords: A live Tinyfish agent navigating the Canada Business Registry... This is fraud prevention. No fake employer
timeline.requirements: ANIMATION - Agent actively querying registry. Messages streaming. Show real-time work happening.
timeline.note: Build trust by showing live verification in action

timeline.keywords: Themis Solution verified. Corporation number six eight nine four seven nine eight. Under sixty seconds
timeline.requirements: GREEN CHECKMARK. Verified status. Corporation number visible. Timestamp showing ~60 seconds.
timeline.note: Proof of successful verification. Show authority and speed.

timeline.keywords: Cleo lands on their Enterprise Compliance Dashboard. Reputation score eighty out of one hundred
timeline.requirements: Dashboard layout. Reputation score 80/100 clearly visible. Trusted Partner status.

timeline.keywords: Now Clio's LMIA pathway. Clio started advertising three weeks ago. Jobbank, LinkedIn, Indeed. Calendar builds itself from start date. Four weeks total. ESDC regulation satisfied
timeline.narration: LMIA regulatory pathway with advertising calendar
timeline.requirements: Calendar showing: Job Bank (complete), LinkedIn (complete), Indeed (in progress). Dates visible. Four-week timeline implied.
timeline.note: Show regulatory requirements being tracked automatically

multi_screen.keywords: Or Clio can select the Global Talent Stream, GTS Category B. No advertising needed. Fourteen business days. AI generates the transition plan automatically
and Clio already has a match. Chidera Obi, ninety-six out of one hundred
NOC alignment one hundred. Wage compliance ninety. Region one hundred. Language ninety-five. Education ninety-five. Total: ninety-six out of one hundred

timeline.narration: Transition plan, matched worker, and detailed score breakdown
timeline.requirements: Transition plan → Shows alternate GTS pathway. Matched workers card → Shows Chidera 96/100. Analysis modal → Shows all 5 scores clearly readable (100, 90, 100, 95, 95).
timeline.note: THREE rapid transitions. Each screen approximately 5 seconds. Last screen must hold analysis/scores visible while narration completes.

timeline.keywords: Total ninety-six out of one hundred... Now the worker side. Chidera Obi, senior software engineer, Lagos, Nigeria
timeline.requirements: Worker intro screen. Clean transition from employer to worker perspective.

timeline.keywords: NOC-21232, bachelor's degree, five-year experience, CLB eleven. This matches Cleo requirement
timeline.requirements: NOC, degree level, experience years, English proficiency (CLB) all VISIBLE and READABLE.

timeline.keywords: One hundred five thousand dollars expected. Cleo is offering one hundred ten thousand. Skills map directly to their stack
timeline.requirements: Salary expectation ($105k) and Offered ($110k) visible. Skills tags visible: Ruby on Rails, React, PostgreSQL match tech stack.

timeline.keywords: Now a live Tinyfish web agent extracts real NOC-21232 in Ontario from the Canadian job market. Live government data, not cached, not mocked. Done. Twenty-five active software developers
timeline.narration: HERO MOMENT: Job Bank agent scanning for real job postings
timeline.requirements: ⭐ HERO MOMENT - 10 SECONDS of pure animation. Agent visibly extracting jobs from Job Bank. Progress messages visible. Shows 'Live government data' in action. Real-time visual proof of concept.
timeline.note: THIS IS YOUR MOST IMPRESSIVE MOMENT. Let it breathe. Don't cut it short. 25 frames = 10 seconds of visual proof that agent is working on actual government data.

timeline.keywords: Ninety-six out of one hundred. NOC perfect. Wage above expectation. Region match. Language competitive. GTS Category B eligible. Chidera could be in Toronto in under six weeks total
timeline.requirements: All 5 score bars visible and READABLE showing final values. NOC 100, Wage 100+, Region 100, Language 95+, Education 95+. GTS eligible. Timeline: 6 weeks to Canada.
timeline.note: Confidence moment. Show all metrics aligned for successful match.

timeline.keywords: One more thing. LMIA fraud costs workers thirty thousand dollars. Our free fraud checker verifies any employer
timeline.requirements: Verify page showing clean input field. Fraud prevention value prop clear.

multi_screen.keywords: checking against ESDC's non-compliant employer list in real-time

timeline.narration: Fraud check running - verifying employer against official list
timeline.requirements: Input filled with company name → Agent running verification animation. Show checking against ESDC list in real-time.
timeline.note: Trust-building sequence. Show anti-fraud mechanism working.

timeline.keywords: Themis Solutions verified. Clean. Every check is auditable, timestamped permanently
timeline.requirements: GREEN CHECKMARK. 'Verified' status. 'Clean' status. Auditable reference ID visible. Timestamp permanent.
timeline.note: Final proof of fraud prevention working

timeline.keywords: Built in seven days using Tinyfish Web Agent. Real employer, real candidate, real government data
timeline.narration: Close - return to homepage with credibility statements
timeline.requirements: Homepage. Clean background. Let narration speak about what was built.

timeline.keywords: Built in the Tinyfish Accelerator
timeline.requirements: STATIC HOMEPAGE. Pure confidence. Let narration land. 13 seconds of your voice over still image builds credibility.
timeline.note: Final emotional punctuation. Your tone matters more than visuals here.

critical_sync_points: Segment 6 ($48.08 vs $52.88): MUST be readable. 9-second hold. Financial credibility.
Segment 16 (Job scan): 10-second animation hero moment. This is the wow factor.
Segment 12 (Scores): Analysis modal shows all 5 scores. Readable. Trustworthy.
Segment 22 (Close): Static homepage, pure narration power. Let voice land.
rebuild_instructions: Replace VIDEO_SPEC.json segment-by-segment with these exact files. Verify each PNG exists in demo-assets/ before building.
